resources.string: Control your smart plugs by voice.

[{\"name\":\"com.portal.kasa.set_plug\",\"description\":\"Turn a smart plug on or off by name.\",\"parameters\":{\"type\":\"OBJECT\",\"properties\":{\"plug_name\":{\"type\":\"STRING\",\"description\":\"The name of the plug as shown in the Kasa app, for example piano lights or coffee maker.\"},\"on\":{\"type\":\"BOOLEAN\",\"description\":\"true to turn the plug on, false to turn it off.\"}},\"required\":[\"plug_name\",\"on\"]}},{\"name\":\"com.portal.kasa.list_plugs\",\"description\":\"List all smart plugs and whether each one is currently on.\",\"parameters\":{\"type\":\"OBJECT\",\"properties\":{},\"required\":[]}}]
